messages: The README introduces the project as a high-performance distributed task scheduling system built in Rust, designed to handle large-scale task orchestration with features like dynamic load balancing, fault tolerance, and real-time monitoring.
result_json.text: The README introduces the project as a high-performance distributed task scheduling system built in Rust, designed to handle large-scale task orchestration with features like dynamic load balancing, fault tolerance, and real-time monitoring.
